Notice Of Motion And Motion Against Waterworks Investment, Inc. For Order Compelling Response To First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Global Events LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant Waterworks Investments, Inc.'s Response To First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $600, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
